SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AboutWindow
Small information window describing the project.
AppShortcut
Enumerates the configurable shortcuts for host window actions.
AppShortcutBindings
Stores the host keyboard map for application shortcuts.
AppTheme
Stores the editable host theme colours and derives the rest of the UI palette from them.
AppThemeColorRole
Editable colour slots that make up a host theme.
AppThemePreset
Built-in host themes offered in the options window.
AudioEnhancementChain
Applies a configurable sequence of host-side audio enhancements.
AudioEnhancementChain.StereoFrame
Mutable stereo frame reused during processing to avoid per-sample allocation.
AudioEnhancementPreset
Built-in audio enhancement presets that can be chained in the host output.
BootRomManager
Manages the user-installed DMG and CGB boot ROM files used by the emulator.
CartridgeController
Base class for cartridge mapper implementations.
CartridgeController.MapperState
 
CartridgeMapperType
Supported Game Boy cartridge mapper families.
Config
Loads and saves the persistent application configuration.
DebugLogger
Small debug logger used for serial output and ad hoc tracing.
DebugLogger.SerialListener
Listener for live serial output updates.
DuckAddresses
This file contains constant addresses in memory and descriptors of each.
DuckAPU
DMG audio processing unit.
DuckAPU.ApuState
 
DuckAPU.NoiseChannelState
 
DuckAPU.PulseChannelState
 
DuckAPU.WaveChannelState
 
DuckAudioOutput
Wraps the host PCM output line used by the emulator.
DuckCPU
Emulates the Game Boy CPU core and its register state.
DuckCPU.CpuState
 
DuckCPU.Flag
CPU status flags stored in the upper nibble of register `F`.
DuckCPU.Interrupt
Interrupt sources exposed through the IF and IE registers.
DuckCPU.Register
Identifies 8-bit and 16-bit CPU registers used by the decoder and instruction helpers.
DuckDecoder
Decodes opcode bytes into executable instruction handlers.
DuckDisplay
A custom JPanel for rendering Game Boy display output.
DuckDisplay.FrameState
 
DuckEmulation
Coordinates the main emulator runtime.
DuckJoypad
Emulates the DMG joypad register at FF00.
DuckJoypad.Button
Buttons exposed through the DMG joypad register.
DuckJoypad.ButtonGroup
Joypad button groups selected by the upper nibble of FF00.
DuckJoypad.JoypadState
 
DuckMemory
Represents the Game Boy memory map used by the emulator.
DuckMemory.MemoryState
 
DuckPPU
Emulates the Game Boy pixel processing unit.
DuckPPU.PpuState
 
DuckSprite
Holds one sprite entry prepared for scanline rendering.
DuckTimer
Emulates the DMG divider and programmable timer unit.
DuckTimer.TimerState
 
DuckWindow
Base window class for the GameDuck desktop UI.
GameArtDisplayMode
Controls which libretro artwork type is shown in the main window.
GameArtProvider
Looks up cached or remote game art for loaded ROMs.
GameArtProvider.GameArtDescriptor
 
GameArtProvider.GameArtResult
Encapsulates fetched game art and its source label.
GameArtScaler
Shared high-quality box-art scaling helpers for host UI previews.
GameLibraryStore
Stores playable ROM images inside GameDuck's managed library.
GameLibraryStore.LibraryEntry
 
GameMetadataStore
Persists resolved libretro game titles for ROM identities.
GameNameBracketDisplayMode
Controls which bracketed suffixes are removed from displayed game names.
GBColor
Represents one DMG palette colour as discrete RGB channels.
GUIActions
Dispatches host UI actions from menus and buttons.
GUIActions.Action
Actions available in the host UI.
InputBindings
Stores the keyboard map for the emulated Game Boy buttons.
InputRouter
Routes host keyboard input to the emulated joypad while the main window has focus.
InstructionLogic
Holds the shared implementation for decoded CPU instructions.
InstructionLogic.ArithmeticType
Arithmetic operations handled by the shared arithmetic helpers.
InstructionLogic.BitOpType
CB-prefixed bit operations.
InstructionLogic.BitwiseType
Bitwise logic operations that target the accumulator.
InstructionLogic.OpLocation
Operand locations used by the decoder.
InstructionLogic.RotateType
Rotate operations in both normal and CB-prefixed forms.
InstructionLogic.ShiftType
Shift operations in CB-prefixed space.
IpsPatch
Applies IPS patches to ROM byte arrays.
LibraryGameInfoWindow
Detailed ROM information window for a library entry.
LibraryWindow
Browser for loading ROMs and hacks from the managed library.
LibretroMetadataProvider
Loads supplemental ROM metadata from libretro's official DAT repository.
LibretroMetadataProvider.LibretroMetadata
 
Main
Launches the GameDuck desktop application.
MainWindow
Hosts the main emulator window and its desktop controls.
ManagedGameRegistry
Persists the set of known save-capable games so save management is not tied to the currently running ROM.
ManagedGameRegistry.StoredGame
 
OpcodeHandler
 
OptionsWindow
Hosts the application options window.
PaletteManager
Browser for loading and deleting saved DMG palettes.
QuickStateManager
Persists managed save-state slots per ROM identity.
QuickStateManager.QuickStateData
 
QuickStateManager.QuickStateIdentity
 
QuickStateManager.StateSlotInfo
 
ROM
Represents a Game Boy ROM image loaded from disk.
RomConsoleFilter
Shared UI filter for grouping ROMs by Game Boy hardware target.
RomConsoleSupport
Resolves the broad console family used for UI filtering.
SaveDataManagerWindow
Dedicated save manager that lists every tracked battery-backed game.
SaveFileManager
Handles battery-backed save files for cartridge RAM.
SaveFileManager.SaveFileEntry
 
SaveFileManager.SaveFileSummary
 
SaveFileManager.SaveIdentity
 
SaveStateManagerWindow
Dedicated manager for save-state slots across tracked library ROMs.
Settings
Holds the mutable application settings used by the emulator and the host UI.
Specifics
Hardware-wide constants for the original DMG model.
Styling
Shared visual tokens for the host UI.
ThemeManager
Browser for loading and deleting saved host themes.
UiText
Central catalog for user-facing desktop UI text.
UiText.AboutWindow
 
UiText.AppShortcuts
 
UiText.AudioEnhancements
 
UiText.Common
 
UiText.GameArt
 
UiText.GameNameDisplayMode
 
UiText.GuiActions
 
UiText.LibraryWindow
 
UiText.MainWindow
 
UiText.OptionsWindow
 
UiText.PaletteManager
 
UiText.ThemeColorRoles
 
UiText.ThemeManager
 
UiText.ThemePresets
